DATA VALUE: BRADEN FRICTION AND SHEAR 1 PROBLEM

ABBREVIATION BS F/S 1

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Friction and Shear 1

Problem DISPLAY_NAME. ..1 - Problem

HELP_TEXT Requires moderate to maximum

> assistance in moving. Complete lifting without sliding against sheets is impossible. Frequently slides down in bed or chair,

> requiring frequent repositioning with maximum assistance.

ID. {AF8D2952-E0DA-411E-91CC-0114F4EB1C33}

TERM................BRADEN FRICTION AND SHEAR 1 PROBLEM

ABBREVIATION BS ACT 1

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Activity 1 Bedfast

DISPLAY_NAME. ..1 - Bedfast

HELP_TEXT Confined to bed

ID. {B9382966-5DE9-4D1C-BEC7-4DEBC5D6DCF5}

TERM BRADEN SCALE ACTIVITY 1 BEDFAST

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE ACTIVITY 2 CHAIRFAST

ABBREVIATION BS ACT 2

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Activity 2 Chairfast

DISPLAY_NAME. ..2 - Chairfast

HELP_TEXT Ability to walk severely limited or

> non-existent. Cannot bear own weight and/or must be assisted into chair or wheelchair.

ID. {CDBB8C3B-B53A-4A0D-91ED-8A53CFE1485F}

TERM BRADEN SCALE ACTIVITY 2 CHAIRFAST

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE ACTIVITY 3 WALKS OCCASIONALLY

ABBREVIATION BS ACT 3

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Activity 3 Walks

Occasionally DISPLAY_NAME. ..3 - Walks Occasionally

HELP_TEXT Walks occasionally during day, but

> for very short distances, with or without assistance. Spends majority of each shift in bed or chair.

ID..................{E47B47BC-6097-4602-9184-BF5A4F6D686A} TERM BRADEN SCALE ACTIVITY 3 WALKS

> OCCASIONALLY

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE ACTIVITY 4 WALKS FREQUENTLY

ABBREVIATION BS ACT 4

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Activity 4 Walks

Frequently DISPLAY_NAME. ..4 - Walks Frequently

HELP_TEXT Walks outside room at least twice a

> day and inside room at least once every two hours during waking hours.

ID..................{C5A8C2EA-E042-4804-9812-77603C47FC6A} TERM BRADEN SCALE ACTIVITY 4 WALKS

> FREQUENTLY

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE FRICTION AND SHEAR 2 POTENTIAL PROBLEM

ABBREVIATION BS F/S 2

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Friction and Shear 2

Potential Problem DISPLAY_NAME. ..2 - Potential Problem

HELP_TEXT Moves feebly or requires minimum

> assistance. During a move skin probably slides to some extent against sheets, chair, restraints or other devices. Maintains relatively good position in chair or bed most of the time but occasionally slides down

ID. {B56338A9-8956-4D27-8BA0-DA50E07359E0}

TERM BRADEN SCALE FRICTION AND SHEAR 2

> POTENTIAL PROBLEM

> Page: 1114

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE FRICTION AND SHEAR 3 NO APPARENT PROBLEM

ABBREVIATION BS F/S 3

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Friction and Shear 3 No

Apparent Problem DISPLAY_NAME. ..3 - No Apparent Problem

HELP_TEXT No Apparent Problem

ID..................{9850E2BF-6600-4E66-8FCD-1517D903BC0F} TERM BRADEN SCALE FRICTION AND SHEAR 3 NO

> APPARENT PROBLEM

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE MOBILITY 1 COMPLETELY IMMOBILE

ABBREVIATION BS MOB 1

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Mobility 1 Completely

> Immobile

DISPLAY_NAME. ..1 - Completely Immobile

HELP_TEXT Does not make even slight changes in

> body or extremity position without assistance

ID. {7607574E-D4C2-4E64-8DC5-ABE7D00917A6}

TERM BRADEN SCALE MOBILITY 1 COMPLETELY

> IMMOBILE

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE MOBILITY 2 VERY LIMITED

ABBREVIATION BS MOB 2

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Mobility 2 Very Limited

DISPLAY_NAME. ..2 - Very Limited

HELP_TEXT Makes occasional slight changes in

> body or extremity position but unable to make frequent or significant changes independently

ID. {868EFA33-877E-4B91-B4FD-9655F66A7160}

TERM BRADEN SCALE MOBILITY 2 VERY LIMITED

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE MOBILITY 3 SLIGHTLY LIMITED

ABBREVIATION BS MOB 3

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Mobility 3 Slightly

Limited DISPLAY_NAME. ..3 - Slightly Limited

HELP_TEXT Makes frequent though slight changes

> in body or extremity position independently

ID. {C54B0A8F-46F1-4DFA-9C24-AB6C2A29CA82}

TERM BRADEN SCALE MOBILITY 3 SLIGHTLY

> LIMITED

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE MOBILITY 4 NO LIMITATION

ABBREVIATION BS MOB 4

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Mobility 4 No Limitation

DISPLAY_NAME. ..4 - No Limitation

HELP_TEXT Makes major and frequent changes in

position without assistance ID. {84BFB8D0-D6E4-4384-88EE-28B7C4EDB275}

TERM BRADEN SCALE MOBILITY 4 NO LIMITATION

> Page: 1115

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE MOISTURE 1 CONSTANTLY MOIST

ABBREVIATION BS MOI 1

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Moisture 1 Constantly

> Moist

DISPLAY_NAME. ..1 - Constantly Moist

HELP_TEXT Skin is kept moist almost constantly

> by perspiration, urine, etc. Dampness is detected every time patient is moved or turned

ID..................{3E2569BA-ECF0-4622-8F4A-26378A2CB466} TERM BRADEN SCALE MOISTURE 1 CONSTANTLY

> MOIST

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE MOISTURE 2 VERY MOIST

ABBREVIATION BS MOI 2

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Moisture 2 Very Moist

DISPLAY_NAME. ..2 - Very Moist

HELP_TEXT Skin is often, but not always moist.

> Linen must be changed at least once a shift

ID..................{2C6D15A3-6166-4D7D-B200-B58EC9C2CABE} TERM BRADEN SCALE MOISTURE 2 VERY MOIST

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE MOISTURE 3 OCCASIONALLY MOIST

ABBREVIATION BS MOI 3

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Moisture 3 Occasionally

> Moist

DISPLAY_NAME. ..3 - Occasionally Moist

HELP_TEXT Skin is occasionally moist, requiring

> an extra linen change approximately once a day

ID..................{D7F2714B-B0C7-4000-8588-8582C1B32ECE} TERM BRADEN SCALE MOISTURE 3 OCCASIONALLY

> MOIST

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE MOISTURE 4 RARELY MOIST

ABBREVIATION BS MOI 4

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Moisture 4 Rarely Moist

DISPLAY_NAME. ..4 - Rarely Moist

HELP_TEXT Skin is usually dry, linen only

> requires changing at routine intervals

ID. {745EA3B9-18C9-4CF3-9DB8-9806A02656E8}

TERM BRADEN SCALE MOISTURE 4 RARELY MOIST

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE NUTRITION 1 VERY POOR

ABBREVIATION BS NUT 1

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Nutrition 1 Very Poor

DISPLAY_NAME. ..1 - Very Poor

HELP_TEXT Never eats a complete meal. Rarely

> eats more than 1/2 of any food offered. Eats 2 servings or less of protein per day. Takes fluids poorly, does not take a liquid supplement. OR is NPO maintained on clear liquids or IV's for more than 5 days

ID. {28A86074-A6B2-455E-ABA4-19195C2E3679}

TERM BRADEN SCALE NUTRITION 1 VERY POOR

> Page: 1116

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE NUTRITION 2 PROBABLY INADEQUATE

ABBREVIATION BS NUT 2

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Nutrition 2 Probably

Inadequate DISPLAY_NAME. ..2 - Probably Inadequate

HELP_TEXT Rarely eats a complete meal and

> generally eats only about 2 of any food offered. Protein intake includes only 3 servings of meat or dairy products per day. Occasionally will take a dietary supplement. OR receives less than optimum amount of liquid.

ID. {7DAB22F6-22E4-4A8B-A6A5-CD1277EB6B87}

TERM BRADEN SCALE NUTRITION 2 PROBABLY

> INADEQUATE

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE NUTRITION 3 ADEQUATE

ABBREVIATION BS NUT 3

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Nutrition 3 Adequate

DISPLAY_NAME. ..3 - Adequate

HELP_TEXT Eats over half of most meals. Eats a

> total of 4 servings of protein (meat, dairy products) per day. Occasionally will refuse a meal, but will usually

> take a supplement when offered. OR is on a tube feeding or TPN regimen.

ID. {3A8A9C59-8DC5-49A9-BAC9-882CB75D8FD5}

TERM BRADEN SCALE NUTRITION 3 ADEQUATE

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE NUTRITION 4 EXCELLENT

ABBREVIATION BS NUT 4

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Nutrition 4 Excellent

DISPLAY_NAME. ..4 - Excellent

HELP_TEXT Eats most of every meal. Never

> refuses a meal. Usually eats a total of 4 or more servings of meat and dairy products. Occasionally eats between meals. Does NOT require supplements

ID. {F09E4D35-1AA8-49A5-9B38-FBFFAFCFC181}

TERM BRADEN SCALE NUTRITION 4 EXCELLENT

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE SENSORY PERCEPTION 1 COMPLETELY LIMITED

ABBREVIATION BS SENC 1

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Sensory Perception 1

Completely Limited DISPLAY_NAME. ..1 - Completely Limited

HELP_TEXT Unresponsive (does not moan, flinch

> or grasp) to painful stimuli, due to diminished level of consciousness or sedation. OR limited ability to feel

pain over most of body ID. {60F646B3-790F-4C5A-B2A0-845915E120E6}

TERM BRADEN SCALE SENSORY PERCEPTION 1

> COMPLETELY LIMITED

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE SENSORY PERCEPTION 2 VERY LIMITED

ABBREVIATION BS SENC 2

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Sensory Perception 2

Very Limited DISPLAY_NAME. ..2 - Very Limited

HELP_TEXT Responds only to painful stimuli.

> Cannot Communicate discomfort except by moaning or restlessness. OR has a sensory impairment which limits the ability to feel pain or discomfort

> over 1/2 of the body

ID..................{98362E63-7245-4E7F-8C30-896A9B923199} TERM BRADEN SCALE SENSORY PERCEPTION 2

> VERY LIMITED

> Page: 1117

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE SENSORY PERCEPTION 3 SLIGHTLY LIMITED

ABBREVIATION BS SENC 3

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Sensory Perception 3

Slightly Limited DISPLAY_NAME. ..3 - Slightly Limited

HELP_TEXT Responds to verbal commands, but

> cannot always communicate discomfort or the need to be turned. OR has some sensory impairment which limits

> ability to feel pain or discomfort in one or two extremities.

ID. {1D01D47D-CDC2-40EE-837B-5417D6EE47D6}

TERM BRADEN SCALE SENSORY PERCEPTION 3

> SLIGHTLY LIMITED

DATA VALUE: BRADEN SCALE SENSORY PERCEPTION 4 NO IMPAIRMENT

ABBREVIATION BS SENC 4

ACTIVE. Yes

DESCRIPTION. Braden Scale Sensory Perception 4 No

Impairment DISPLAY_NAME. ..4 - No Impairment

HELP_TEXT Responds to verbal commands. Has no

> sensory deficit which would limit ability to feel or voice pain or discomfort.

ID..................{10304656-E5E8-4F32-8358-A9F80511EFDA} TERM BRADEN SCALE SENSORY PERCEPTION 4 NO

> IMPAIRMENT
